name: com.bankruptcyobserver/mcp
title: Bankruptcy Observer
description: MCP server for US business bankruptcy filings, dockets, court documents, case summaries, and monitored-case intelligence. Free tier for basic lookups; subscription for full agent access.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer <MCP API token> for subscriber tools. Optional for free-tier exact-name and 7-digit case-number lookups. Also supports X-API-Key.
